title: 「V1 + To-infinitive」句型
titleEn: Using a first verb followed by a to-infinitive
formula: Subject + V1 + to + base verb + other information

formulas.formula: Subject + V1 + to + base verb + other information
Subject + modal verb + V1 + to + base verb + other information

example: If you don’t study, you may fail to pass the exam.
exampleZh: 如果你不溫習，你可能無法通過考試。

examples.en: If you don’t study, you may fail to pass the exam.
examples.zh: 如果你不溫習，你可能無法通過考試。

meaning.zh: 第一個主要動詞表達計劃、希望、答應、拒絕、嘗試或未能完成等意思，後面的 to-infinitive 說明相關行動。

rules.en: Use the base form after to.
rules.zh: To 後面必須使用動詞原形。
examples: She decided to join the club.

rules.en: V1 changes for tense and subject agreement.
rules.zh: V1 可以按時態或主語改變。

rules.en: Use the base form of V1 after a modal verb.
rules.zh: 情態動詞後面的 V1 使用原形。
examples: She might decide to leave early.

rules.en: Place not carefully because it can negate V1 or the infinitive.
rules.zh: 否定意思可以放在 V1 或 to-infinitive 的不同位置，意思並不相同。
examples: He did not manage to finish.

rules.en: Only certain verbs take a to-infinitive directly.
rules.zh: 並非所有動詞都可以直接接 to-infinitive；本課使用 decide、plan、hope、promise、manage 等常見 V1。

rules.en: Do not confuse this pattern with object + to-infinitive or bare-infinitive patterns.
rules.zh: 本課集中 V1＋to＋動詞原形，不包括 tell someone to、make someone do 或 enjoy doing。

rules.en: Fail to pass means not to succeed in passing.
rules.zh: Fail to pass 表示「未能成功通過」，符合 V1＋to-infinitive 結構。

benefits.en: It expresses precise meanings through the first verb.
benefits.zh: 第一個動詞能準確區分計劃、答應、拒絕、嘗試和未能完成。
它可把 made a promise that 等較長表達縮短。

benefits.en: It connects an attitude or decision with an action.
benefits.zh: 它先說明人物的態度、決定或能力，再連接相關行動。
I hope to、I managed to 等固定框架令說話更流暢。
它能把兩個簡單句合併成更完整自然的句子。

en: Rewrite each sentence using a suitable V1 + to-infinitive structure.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用合適的 V1＋to-infinitive 句型改寫以下句子。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: Mia decided that she would join the school choir.
questions.promptZh: 米婭決定她會加入學校合唱團。
questions.answer: Mia decided to join the school choir.
questions.answerZh: 米婭決定加入學校合唱團。
questions.highlight: Mia decided to join the school choir.

questions.prompt: Leo has a clear plan. He will save enough money for a new bicycle.
questions.promptZh: 里奧有一個清晰的計劃。他會儲夠錢買一輛新單車。
questions.answer: Leo plans to save enough money for a new bicycle.
questions.answerZh: 里奧計劃儲夠錢買一輛新單車。
questions.highlight: Leo plans to save enough money for a new bicycle.

questions.prompt: We hope that we can visit the science museum next month.
questions.promptZh: 我們希望下個月可以參觀科學博物館。
questions.answer: We hope to visit the science museum next month.
questions.answerZh: 我們希望下個月參觀科學博物館。
questions.highlight: We hope to visit the science museum next month.

questions.prompt: Daniel made a promise that he would return the book on Friday.
questions.promptZh: 丹尼爾作出承諾，表示他會在星期五歸還本書。
questions.answer: Daniel promised to return the book on Friday.
questions.answerZh: 丹尼爾答應在星期五歸還本書。
questions.highlight: Daniel promised to return the book on Friday.

questions.prompt: The children reached an agreement that they would share the computer.
questions.promptZh: 孩子們達成協議，表示他們會共用電腦。
questions.answer: The children agreed to share the computer.
questions.answerZh: 孩子們同意共用電腦。
questions.highlight: The children agreed to share the computer.

questions.prompt: Chloe offered her help and said, “I can carry the boxes for you.”
questions.promptZh: 克洛伊主動提出幫忙，並說：「我可以替你搬這些箱子。」
questions.answer: Chloe offered to carry the boxes for us.
questions.answerZh: 克洛伊主動提出替我們搬箱子。
questions.highlight: Chloe offered to carry the boxes for us.

questions.prompt: Ethan said no when we asked whether he would copy the homework.
questions.promptZh: 我們問伊森會否抄功課時，他拒絕了。
questions.answer: Ethan refused to copy the homework.
questions.answerZh: 伊森拒絕抄功課。
questions.highlight: Ethan refused to copy the homework.

questions.prompt: After several attempts, Ava succeeded in opening the jar with the tight lid.
questions.promptZh: 嘗試數次後，艾娃成功打開了瓶蓋很緊的玻璃瓶。
questions.answer: Ava managed to open the jar with the tight lid.
questions.answerZh: 艾娃成功打開了瓶蓋很緊的玻璃瓶。
questions.highlight: Ava managed to open the jar with the tight lid.

questions.prompt: Although he tried several times, the driver could not start the old bus.
questions.promptZh: 雖然司機嘗試了數次，但仍無法發動那輛舊巴士。
questions.answer: The driver failed to start the old bus.
questions.answerZh: 司機未能發動那輛舊巴士。
questions.highlight: The driver failed to start the old bus.

questions.prompt: After some practice, I learnt how to use this printer.
questions.promptZh: 經過一些練習後，我學會了使用這部打印機。
questions.answer: I learnt to use this printer after some practice.
questions.answerZh: 經過一些練習後，我學會了使用這部打印機。
questions.highlight: I learnt to use this printer after some practice.

questions.prompt: Sarah made an effort to stay calm during the interview.
questions.promptZh: 莎拉在面試期間努力保持冷靜。
questions.answer: Sarah tried to stay calm during the interview.
questions.answerZh: 莎拉在面試期間努力保持冷靜。
questions.highlight: Sarah tried to stay calm during the interview.

questions.prompt: Noah did not lock the back door because he forgot about it.
questions.promptZh: 諾亞忘記了鎖後門，因此沒有把門鎖上。
questions.answer: Noah forgot to lock the back door.
questions.answerZh: 諾亞忘記了鎖後門。
questions.highlight: Noah forgot to lock the back door.

questions.prompt: Emma did not forget that she had to bring her passport.
questions.promptZh: 艾瑪沒有忘記她必須帶備護照。
questions.answer: Emma remembered to bring her passport.
questions.answerZh: 艾瑪記得帶備護照。
questions.highlight: Emma remembered to bring her passport.

questions.prompt: It looked as though the baby was falling asleep.
questions.promptZh: 那名嬰兒看起來好像正在入睡。
questions.answer: The baby seemed to be falling asleep.
questions.answerZh: 那名嬰兒似乎正在入睡。

questions.prompt: I do not have enough money for the repair of this old laptop.
questions.promptZh: 我沒有足夠金錢維修這部舊手提電腦。
questions.answer: I cannot afford to repair this old laptop.
questions.answerZh: 我沒有能力支付維修這部舊手提電腦的費用。
questions.highlight: I cannot afford to repair this old laptop.

questions.prompt: For the journey, Jason chose the train rather than the coach.
questions.promptZh: 傑森選擇乘搭火車，而不是長途巴士完成這段旅程。
questions.answer: Jason chose to travel by train rather than by coach.
questions.answerZh: 傑森選擇乘火車而不是長途巴士出行。
questions.highlight: Jason chose to travel by train rather than by coach.

questions.prompt: The team made arrangements for a meeting on Tuesday afternoon.
questions.promptZh: 團隊安排了在星期二下午舉行會議。
questions.answer: The team arranged to meet on Tuesday afternoon.
questions.answerZh: 團隊安排在星期二下午見面。
questions.highlight: The team arranged to meet on Tuesday afternoon.

questions.prompt: Grace got ready because she was going to give her first presentation.
questions.promptZh: 格蕾絲作好準備，因為她將會進行首次簡報。
questions.answer: Grace prepared to give her first presentation.
questions.answerZh: 格蕾絲為首次進行簡報作好準備。

questions.prompt: The visitors expected that they would wait outside for a few minutes.
questions.promptZh: 訪客預計自己需要在外面等候數分鐘。
questions.answer: The visitors expected to wait outside for a few minutes.
questions.answerZh: 訪客預計需要在外面等候數分鐘。
questions.highlight: The visitors expected to wait outside for a few minutes.

questions.prompt: It appeared that the dog recognised its former owner.
questions.promptZh: 那隻狗似乎認出了牠以前的主人。
questions.answer: The dog appeared to recognise its former owner.
questions.answerZh: 那隻狗似乎認出了牠以前的主人。
questions.highlight: The dog appeared to recognise its former owner.

questions.prompt: Oliver acted as if he understood the joke, although he did not.
questions.promptZh: 奧利弗裝作明白那個笑話，但其實他並不明白。
questions.answer: Oliver pretended to understand the joke.

questions.prompt: We made an attempt to move the table without scratching the floor.
questions.promptZh: 我們嘗試移動桌子，同時避免刮花地板。
questions.answer: We attempted to move the table without scratching the floor.

questions.prompt: The rain kept falling throughout the night.
questions.promptZh: 雨整晚持續下個不停。
questions.answer: The rain continued to fall throughout the night.
questions.answerZh: 雨整晚持續下個不停。
questions.highlight: The rain continued to fall throughout the night.

questions.prompt: The class began discussing the final question.
questions.promptZh: 全班開始討論最後一道問題。
questions.answer: The class began to discuss the final question.
questions.answerZh: 全班開始討論最後一道問題。
questions.highlight: The class began to discuss the final question.

questions.prompt: Maya has every intention of applying for the summer programme.
questions.promptZh: 瑪雅完全有意申請這個暑期課程。
questions.answer: Maya intends to apply for the summer programme.
questions.answerZh: 瑪雅有意申請這個暑期課程。
questions.highlight: Maya intends to apply for the summer programme.

questions.prompt: The company’s aim is a reduction in paper waste this year.
questions.promptZh: 公司的目標是在今年減少紙張浪費。
questions.answer: The company aims to reduce paper waste this year.
questions.answerZh: 公司的目標是在今年減少紙張浪費。
questions.highlight: The company aims to reduce paper waste this year.

questions.prompt: The students have earned the right to receive clear feedback after all their hard work.
questions.promptZh: 學生付出了很多努力，因此值得獲得清楚的回饋。
questions.answer: The students deserve to receive clear feedback after all their hard work.
questions.answerZh: 學生付出了很多努力，因此值得獲得清楚的回饋。
questions.highlight: The students deserve to receive clear feedback after all their hard work.

questions.prompt: Ben paused because he was unsure whether he should ask the stranger for directions.
questions.promptZh: 本停頓了一下，因為他不肯定應否向陌生人問路。
questions.answer: Ben hesitated to ask the stranger for directions.

questions.highlight: Ben hesitated to ask the stranger for directions.

questions.prompt: The witness politely said that she would not answer the final question.

questions.prompt: People generally speak more quietly in libraries.

questions.answer: People tend to speak more quietly in libraries.
questions.answerZh: 人們通常會在圖書館內較輕聲說話。
questions.highlight: People tend to speak more quietly in libraries.

questions.prompt: The child claimed that he had seen a fox near the park.
questions.promptZh: 那名孩子聲稱自己曾在公園附近看見一隻狐狸。
questions.answer: The child claimed to have seen a fox near the park.
questions.answerZh: 那名孩子聲稱自己曾在公園附近看見一隻狐狸。
questions.highlight: The child claimed to have seen a fox near the park.

questions.prompt: It appears that the scientist has found a simpler solution.
questions.promptZh: 那名科學家似乎已經找到一個較簡單的解決方法。
questions.answer: The scientist appears to have found a simpler solution.
questions.answerZh: 那名科學家似乎已經找到一個較簡單的解決方法。
questions.highlight: The scientist appears to have found a simpler solution.

questions.prompt: It seems that the train is running ten minutes late.
questions.promptZh: 火車似乎會遲到十分鐘。
questions.answer: The train seems to be running ten minutes late.
questions.answerZh: 火車似乎會遲到十分鐘。
questions.highlight: The train seems to be running ten minutes late.

questions.highlight: The shop cannot afford to lower its prices further.

questions.prompt: Anna decided that she would not answer the message immediately.

questions.answer: Anna decided not to answer the message immediately.
questions.answerZh: 安娜決定不立即回覆該則訊息。
questions.highlight: Anna decided not to answer the message immediately.

questions.prompt: The boys gave their word that they would not enter the closed area.
questions.promptZh: 男孩們承諾不會進入封閉區域。
questions.answer: The boys promised not to enter the closed area.

questions.prompt: Although it checked the surface twice, the machine did not detect the small crack.
questions.promptZh: 雖然機器檢查了表面兩次，但仍未能發現那道細小裂縫。
questions.answer: The machine failed to detect the small crack.

questions.prompt: Despite the long drought, our neighbours succeeded in keeping their garden alive.
questions.promptZh: 儘管長時間乾旱，我們的鄰居仍成功令花園內的植物存活。
questions.answer: Our neighbours managed to keep their garden alive during the long drought.
questions.answerZh: 在長時間乾旱期間，我們的鄰居成功令花園內的植物存活。
questions.highlight: Our neighbours managed to keep their garden alive during the long drought.

questions.prompt: By chance, I met my old teacher at the station.
questions.promptZh: 我碰巧在車站遇見以前的老師。
questions.answer: I happened to meet my old teacher at the station.
questions.answerZh: 我碰巧在車站遇見以前的老師。
questions.highlight: I happened to meet my old teacher at the station.

questions.prompt: The local council’s plan is to turn the empty building into a youth centre.
questions.promptZh: 地方議會的計劃是把空置建築物改建成青年中心。
questions.answer: The local council plans to turn the empty building into a youth centre.

questions.highlight: If you ignore the warning signs, you may fail to prevent a larger problem.

questions.answer: Before leaving, Marcus remembered to send the final report to his manager.

questions.prompt: The local museum does not have enough money to keep every exhibition open throughout the year.
questions.promptZh: 本地博物館沒有足夠資金讓所有展覽全年開放。
questions.answer: The local museum cannot afford to keep every exhibition open throughout the year.

questions.highlight: The local museum cannot afford to keep every exhibition open throughout the year.

questions.prompt: After several difficult negotiations, both sides finally succeeded in reaching an agreement.
questions.promptZh: 經過數次艱難談判後，雙方最終成功達成協議。
questions.answer: After several difficult negotiations, both sides finally managed to reach an agreement.
questions.answerZh: 經過數次艱難談判後，雙方最終成功達成協議。
questions.highlight: After several difficult negotiations, both sides finally managed to reach an agreement.
